headline: State Street Investment Management Announces Change to ETF Lineup
summary: BOSTON, May 28, 2026--State Street Investment Management today announced plans to close and liquidate the State Street® DoubleLine® Emerging Markets Fixed Income ETF (Ticker: EMTL) based on State Street Investment Management’s review of its ETF offerings.
